_note: Synthetic observation log. The last 3 entries form the afternoon-confusion + unfinished-lunch pattern that the Watcher correlates with the missed lisinopril refill (Journey C). Earlier entries are benign baseline.

entries.author: aide_lourdes
entries.note: Good morning. Glucose 132. Ate full breakfast. Cheerful, oriented.

entries.author: maya
entries.note: Watched the game together, did fine. Took evening meds.

entries.author: aide_lourdes
entries.note: More confused than usual in the afternoon — asked twice what day it was. Only finished half his lunch.

entries.author: aide_lourdes
entries.note: Afternoon disorientation again around 3pm. Didn't finish lunch. Morning was okay.

entries.author: maya
entries.note: Dad seemed foggy this afternoon, left most of lunch on the plate. Third day like this.
